title: cyclosorus × dentaridus
intro: Cyclosorus × dentaridus is a hybrid plant species in the family Thelypteridaceae, commonly known as the Chinese ladder fern. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used in various cultures for its potential health benefits. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing inflammation and protecting cells from damage. Cyclosorus × dentaridus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever and digestive issues.
